title: Mnēma Canon
purpose: Define how memory, record integrity, and continuity are handled in the system.
Provide human-readable intent for audit and operator understanding.
Separate human-facing meaning from enforceable governance contracts.

principles.name: Record is care
principles.definition: A record is created to preserve truth and continuity, not to control outcomes.

principles.name: Repair with record
principles.definition: Changes are captured as new records. Existing records are not rewritten or erased.

principles.name: No hidden actions
principles.definition: Privileged or side-effect actions require explicit operator approval and a recorded plan.

principles.name: Integrity first
principles.definition: Hash and manifest validation is required before records are treated as authoritative.

mnema.description: Record Authority. Defines and enforces the integrity rules for record sets.

ueden.description: Capture. Produces new records and receipts. Append-only.

mueden.description: Verification + Recall. Validates hashes/manifests and provides read-only record recall.

non_goals: This artifact does not authorize execution, changes, or privileged actions.
This artifact is not used directly for enforcement. Enforcement lives in TRUNK contracts.

metadata.notes: Sanitized canonical description. No myth-language. No personal content.
